reviews.review_msg: Take a class with Doug!!  He is one of the nicest, most down-to-earth people you'll meet!  Helps you as much as possible and is very fair with his marking.  He really does go above and beyond to help you with concepts and labs.  Even though 329 is no longer required, take is as a fun 4 credit course

Very fair & kind marker,but needs to work on clarity during lectures.Focuses on authors' biographies way too much.She really cares about how the works related to the peroids in which they were written-v. historical approach-everything should be analyzed as a document of its time. Doesn't like to provide examples of points to be made using texts.

I thought the marking was fair, and her lectures not bad.  However, she's as biased as a professor you can find, and, if you are planning on taking any of her clasess, be prepared for an endless tirade against men, americans, the federal government,... it just goes on and on and on and on...
